experiment.title: Production-Scale Distributed Transaction Chaos Experiment
experiment.description: Comprehensive production-scale chaos engineering experiment showcasing distributed transactions across 8-10 hops: HA-Proxy → App Servers → Kafka → RabbitMQ → PostgreSQL Primary/Replica → DR Site → MongoDB → Redis. Demonstrates the power of Chaos Toolkit and distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry across a production-like environment with disaster recovery capabilities.
